name: Walls and Gates
description: Given an m x n grid initialized with INF (2^31-1) for empty rooms, 0 for gates, and -1 for walls, fill each empty room with the distance to its nearest gate. If impossible to reach a gate, leave as INF.
constraints: m == rooms.length. n == rooms[i].length. 1 <= m, n <= 250. rooms[i][j] is -1, 0, or 2^31-1.
